## Entities.Converters.Confections.confectionMolds variable

Converter for confection molds with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
confectionMolds: Converter<Model.IOptionsWithPreferred<IConfectionMoldRef, MoldId>>
```
